question: Before creating a new GitHub issue for a failing CI test in the Megatron-LM repo, what gh command should you run to check for an existing duplicate issue? Answer with one gh command using --state open and --search on the failed test filename.
ground_truth: gh issue list --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --state open --search "<failed-test-filename>" --json number,title,url --limit 10
expected_behavior: Uses gh issue list with --state open and --search on the test filename
